name: SGA: Plug&Play Geometric Verification for Educational Video Synthesis

description: arXiv:2607.18116v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent work leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate executable code for pedagogical animations using libraries such as Manim. However, ensuring spatial correctness and visual legibility remains challenging, as existing frameworks emphasize pedagogical content while overlooking geometric occlusions. We propose the Symbolic Geometric Agen...
author: Lopez Jhon, Hinojosa Carlos, Ghanem Bernard
